title: Darshan Hiranandani : Is There a Free Way to Sync Data Between Monday.com and Google Sheets?
excerpt:

posts.author: darshanhiranandani (Darshan Hiranandani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I’m Darshan Hiranandani, working on linking a Google spreadsheet to my Monday.com dashboard, with the goal of having any changes made in Monday automatically reflected in the sheet. While Zapier is an option, I’m looking for a free alternative.

Does anyone have experience with this type of automation, or perhaps know a way to connect the two platforms without incurring any extra costs?

Appreciate any help!

Regards
Darshan Hiranandani
